retrieved_result: Annual Resale Certificate for Sales Tax Annual Resale Certificate for Sales Tax Businesses that register with the Florida Department of Revenue to collect sales tax are issued a Florida Annual Resale Certificate for Sales Tax (Annual Resale Certificate). The certificate allows business owners, or their representatives, to buy or rent prop
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result describes a sales tax resale certificate for Florida, not anything related to IDEs or software development environments.
